error_signature: HTTP Request to root domain won't scrape subdomains
title: Root domain request does not scrape subdomains
symptom: An HTTP request to the root domain does not automatically crawl or scrape subdomains or paths.
applies_when: Making an HTTP request to a root domain
Expecting to scrape subdomains and paths
not_this_if: You have a predefined list of URLs to scrape
root_cause: n8n does not have a built-in crawler to automatically discover and scrape subdomains or paths. It requires explicit URLs to be provided for scraping.
fix_steps: Store the known URLs (including subdomains and paths) in a Set node.
Use a SplitInBatches node to iterate over the URLs.
Send an HTTP request for each URL and handle the output accordingly.
agent_instruction: Create a list of URLs to scrape and use a SplitInBatches node to process each one.
